Tests for authentication and user endpoints.  Covers:     - POST /api/auth/regis
Register a valid new user returns 201 with user details.
Registering with an already-used email returns 409.
Omitting required fields yields a 422 validation error.
A password shorter than 8 characters is rejected (422).
Ensure a user exists in the DB before login tests.
Valid credentials return 200 with token data.
Login with an unknown email returns 401.
Register + login so we have a real refresh token to work with.
Providing a valid refresh token returns a new token pair.
A garbage refresh token is rejected with 401.
An authenticated request returns the user's profile.
A request without a token returns 401.
Tests for chatbot endpoints.  Covers:     - POST /api/chat/send        (success
POST /api/chat/send returns 200 with an assistant response.          The DeepSee
GET /api/chat/sessions returns [] when no sessions exist.
After sending a message, the session appears in the list.
Tests for daily-log endpoints.  Covers:     - POST /api/daily-logs  (create new
POST a new daily-log entry returns 201 with the created fields.
POSTing to the same date updates (upserts) the existing log.
GET /api/daily-logs/today returns today's log (creates one if absent).
GET /api/daily-logs/date/<date> returns the log for that date.
A date with no log returns 404.
Tests for meal endpoints.  Covers:     - POST   /api/meals       (create meal wi
A fully-populated meal returns 201 with every field echoed.
GET /api/meals?start=&end= returns meals in that window.
PUT /api/meals/{id} with partial data updates only supplied fields.
PUT for a non-existent meal returns 404.
DELETE /api/meals/{id} removes the user's own meal (204).
A user cannot delete another user's meal (403).
DELETE for a non-existent meal returns 404.
Tests for metrics endpoints.  Covers:     - GET /api/metrics/summary  (empty dat
GET /api/metrics/summary with no data returns defaults.
Aggregated metrics reflect several days of logged data.
Logs outside the requested date range are excluded.
GET /api/metrics/weight with no weight data.          This call will raise ``Att
Tests for suggestion endpoints.  Covers:     - GET  /api/suggestions/today
GET /api/suggestions/today when no suggestion exists returns 404.
When a suggestion exists for today, it is returned.
POST /api/suggestions/refresh calls DeepSeek and returns new data.
Tests for workout endpoints.  Covers:     - POST   /api/workouts       (create w
A fully-populated workout returns 201 with every field echoed.
GET /api/workouts?start=&end= returns workouts in that window.
PUT /api/workouts/{id} with partial data updates supplied fields.
PUT for a non-existent workout returns 404.
DELETE /api/workouts/{id} removes the user's own workout (204).
A user cannot delete another user's workout (403).
